patch:
commit e61e26091c5088b32b68e020cd51ab6de972004f
Author: SahilPatidar <patidarsahil2001@gmail.com>
Date:   Fri Mar 15 13:38:46 2024 +0530

    [InstCombine] Fold `mul (sext bool X), Y` into `select X, -Y, 0` (#84792)
    
    Alive2: https://alive2.llvm.org/ce/z/n_ns-W
    
    Resolve #84608

diff --git a/llvm/lib/Transforms/InstCombine/InstCombineMulDivRem.cpp b/llvm/lib/Transforms/InstCombine/InstCombineMulDivRem.cpp
index 7be7923175e4..9d4c271f990d 100644
--- a/llvm/lib/Transforms/InstCombine/InstCombineMulDivRem.cpp
+++ b/llvm/lib/Transforms/InstCombine/InstCombineMulDivRem.cpp
@@ -448,6 +448,14 @@ Instruction *InstCombinerImpl::visitMul(BinaryOperator &I) {
   if (match(Op1, m_ZExt(m_Value(X))) && X->getType()->isIntOrIntVectorTy(1))
     return SelectInst::Create(X, Op0, ConstantInt::getNullValue(Ty));
 
+  // mul (sext X), Y -> select X, -Y, 0
+  // mul Y, (sext X) -> select X, -Y, 0
+  if (match(&I, m_c_Mul(m_OneUse(m_SExt(m_Value(X))), m_Value(Y))) &&
+      X->getType()->isIntOrIntVectorTy(1))
+    return SelectInst::Create(
+        X, Builder.CreateNeg(Y, "", /*HasNUW=*/false, I.hasNoSignedWrap()),
+        ConstantInt::getNullValue(Op0->getType()));
+
   Constant *ImmC;
   if (match(Op1, m_ImmConstant(ImmC))) {
     // (sext bool X) * C --> X ? -C : 0

tests.test_body:
define i64 @sext_diff_i1_xor_sub_1(i64 %a, i1 %b, i1 %c) {
; CHECK-LABEL: define i64 @sext_diff_i1_xor_sub_1(
; CHECK-SAME: i64 [[A:%.*]], i1 [[B:%.*]], i1 [[C:%.*]]) {
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[D:%.*]] = sext i1 [[B]] to i64
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[E_NEG:%.*]] = zext i1 [[C]] to i64
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[R:%.*]] = add nsw i64 [[E_NEG]], [[D]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i64 [[R]]
  %d = sext i1 %b to i64
  %e = sext i1 %c to i64
  %f = xor i64 %d, %a
  %r = sub i64 %d, %e
  ret i64 %r
}
tests.source_program:
define i64 @sext_diff_i1_xor_sub_1(i64 %a, i1 %b, i1 %c) {
  %d = sext i1 %b to i64
  %e = sext i1 %c to i64
  %f = xor i64 %d, %a
  %r = sub i64 %d, %e
  ret i64 %r
}

tests.test_body:
define i64 @sext_multi_uses(i64 %a, i1 %b, i64 %x) {
; CHECK-LABEL: define i64 @sext_multi_uses(
; CHECK-SAME: i64 [[A:%.*]], i1 [[B:%.*]], i64 [[X:%.*]]) {
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[TMP1:%.*]] = add i64 [[X]], [[A]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[TMP2:%.*]] = sub i64 0, [[TMP1]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[R:%.*]] = select i1 [[B]], i64 [[TMP2]], i64 [[A]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i64 [[R]]
  %c = sext i1 %b to i64
  %d = xor i64 %a, %c
  %e = sub i64 %d, %c
  %f = mul i64 %x, %c
  %r = add i64 %f, %e
  ret i64 %r
}
tests.source_program:
define i64 @sext_multi_uses(i64 %a, i1 %b, i64 %x) {
  %c = sext i1 %b to i64
  %d = xor i64 %a, %c
  %e = sub i64 %d, %c
  %f = mul i64 %x, %c
  %r = add i64 %f, %e
  ret i64 %r
}
tests.current_optimized_program:
define i64 @sext_multi_uses(i64 %a, i1 %b, i64 %x) {
  %c = sext i1 %b to i64
  %1 = sub i64 0, %a
  %e = select i1 %b, i64 %1, i64 %a
  %f = mul i64 %c, %x
  %r = add i64 %f, %e
  ret i64 %r
}

issue.title: Optimize x * !x to 0 for vector
issue.author: k-arrows

comments.author: SahilPatidar
comments.body:
@dtcxzyw,
 I would like to work on this one.

comments.author: SahilPatidar
comments.body:
> Alive2: https://alive2.llvm.org/ce/z/-XEPRP

This case also needs to be handled. Additionally, I couldn't find any such pattern in the existing code in InstCombineMulDivRem.cpp, so it likely needs to be implemented from scratch.
